- residual risks: none

Publish-ready Maintainer Review Draft
The change looks aligned with the linked issue and the validation path now behaves consistently across the updated entry points.

One follow-up suggestion: please mention the added regression coverage in the PR description so future reviewers can spot the intended contract more quickly.
